title: HUNGARY enforcement action against University of Szeged (5,570)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Hungarian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,570 on the University of Szeged. The controller operates student housing. To determine which students would receive a place, the university processed the personal data of applicants, including health data, to determine their social circumstances, wh...
